Fade Options

Fade styles we handle every day

Clean transitions, even blending, and sharp perimeter work tailored to your head shape and preferred maintenance level.

Skin Fade

Tight-to-skin finish with smooth graduation on the sides and back for a high-contrast, polished look.

Taper Fade

Subtle cleanup around temples and nape that keeps length up top while still looking sharp between cuts.

Low, Mid, High

Fade height placement set to your style goals, hair density, and how bold or conservative you want the final shape.

Your Visit

What to expect at your fade appointment

Service flow

  • Quick consultation on fade height, line shape, and finish.
  • Detailed clipper and shear blend with edge refinement.
  • Final check from multiple angles before you leave the chair.

Best fit for

Clients searching for dependable skin fades, taper fades, and lineup-ready cuts in National City.

FAQ

Questions clients ask before booking a fade

Which fade should I ask for?

If you are unsure, the consultation can narrow it down based on how much contrast you want, how quickly you want it to grow out, and how clean you want the perimeter to feel.

Do fades work with different hair textures?

Yes. Fade placement and blending approach can be adjusted for straight, wavy, curly, and coily hair so the transition looks intentional instead of forced.

Can I add a lineup to my fade?

Absolutely. Many clients want the blend from the fade plus sharper edge work around the hairline, temples, or beard for a more complete finish.
